productDisplayName: Nike Men's As T90 Black Short
description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester with a 100% polyester mesh on the sides and back upper, has Dri-Fit technology, elasticated waist with an inner drawstring, zippered pockets on the sides, blue stripe on the back along the length of the shorts, Dri-Fit labeling printed near the right pocket, and T90 and swoosh in plastic embossed on the shortsFittingComfortWash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not use softeners Do not bleach Tumble dry warm Warm iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean or wet clean Stylish to the T, these polyester shorts from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you make those winning goals during a friendly soccer game. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the fit by using the drawstring on the inside. The side zippered pockets keep your belongings safe, while the embossed branding adds to these shorts an exclusive style statement. Team it with nike Sports tees and soccer shoes for that smart, sporty look.
